[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001 1
1 1001110 4
2 0100110 3
3 1110111 6
4 1010000 2
5 0100001 2
6 1111111 a
7 0011010 3

12 21 0000000 a

34 43 0011010 3 match 7

56 65 0000010 1

70 07 0100110 3 match 2

72 27 0100000 1
